import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ val: Int) -> List<Int>
  let n = sorted.len()
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let elem = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and val < elem
      result = list.push(result, val)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, elem)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, val)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(n)
      sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, n)
    when None
      sorted = sorted
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut deduped: List<Int> = []
  mut prev: Option<Int> = None
  mut j = 0
  while j < sorted.len()
    let val = match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let should_add = match prev
    when None
      true
    when Some(p)
      p != val
    end
    if should_add
      deduped = list.push(deduped, val)
      prev = Some(val)
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut k = 0
  let m = deduped.len()
  while k < m
    let val = match deduped.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      output = "#{val}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{val}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
